Mtn To Deem Admitted Pltf'S Req For Admission
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vien Do, Tel. 415.730.4018, defendant appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S Motion To Deem Admitted Plaintiff's Request For Admission is granted, in absence of opposition. Sanctions in the amount of $1,000 is granted. Court to prepare order. Judge Pro Tem: James Watson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Mtn To Compel First Responses To Pltf'S First Set Of Special Interoggs
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vien Do, Tel. 415.730.4018, defendant appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S Motion To Compel First Responses To Plaintiff's First Set Of Special Interoggatories is granted, in absence of opposition. Sanctions in the amount of $2,500 is granted. Court to prepare order. Judge Pro Tem: James Watson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Mtn To Deem Admitted Pltf'S Req For Admission
Off Calendar Jun-26-2013 Continued To Jul-10-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff DISCOVER BANK'S Motion to Deem Admitted Plaintiff's Request for Admission is continued to July 10, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and non-opposition to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 26, 2013 at 4:00 pm, or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court received an incomplete set of courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge Pro Tem: Philip M. Andersen; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Mtn To Compel First Responses To Pltf'S First Set Of Special Interoggs
Off Calendar Jun-26-2013 Continued To Jul-10-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff DISCOVER BANK'S Motion to Compel First Responses to Plaintiff's First Set of Special Interrogatories is continued to July 10, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and non-opposition to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 26, 2013 at 4:00 pm, or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court received an incomplete set of courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge Pro Tem: Philip M. Andersen; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
